zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Brocas於1320年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾黑爾波內 聖 約翰時，她的父親Sir John de Brocas31歲，母親Margaret Fettiplace25歲。她於1339年與Sir Thomas Missenden在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1383年在英國英格蘭享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Brocas于1320年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾黑爾波內 聖 約翰时，她的父亲Sir John de Brocas31岁，母亲Margaret Fettiplace25岁。她于1339年与Sir Thomas Missenden在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1383年在英国英格兰享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brocas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  French: locative name from Brocas in Les Landes, SW France.

variants.name: Brookhouse
meanings: English: topographic name for a house by a stream, from Middle English brok(e) ‘brook’ + hous ‘house’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Brookhouse in Laughton (Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Brocas was born in 1320, in Sherborne St John, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Brocas, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Fettiplace, was 25. She married Sir Thomas Missenden in 1339, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1383, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.Sherborne St John, Hampshire, England: Sherborne St John, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Brocas est née en 1320, à Sherborne St John, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Brocas, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fettiplace, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Missenden en 1339, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1383, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Brocas 1320 in Sherborne St John, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Brocas 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fettiplace 25. Sie hat 1339 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England Sir Thomas Missenden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1383 im Alter von 63 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Brocas è nata il nel 1320 nel Sherborne St John, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Brocas, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fettiplace, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Missenden nel 1339, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1383, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Brocasが1320年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアシェルボルン スト ジョンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Brocasは31歳，母Margaret Fettiplaceは25歳であった。1339年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードでSir Thomas Missendenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1383年にイギリスイギリスで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Sherborne St John, Hampshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 셔본 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Brocas(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 셔본 스트 존에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Brocas(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fettiplace(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1339년 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 Sir Thomas Missenden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 영국 잉글랜드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Brocas nasceu em 1320, em Sherborne St John, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Brocas, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fettiplace, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Missenden em 1339, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1383, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Sherborne St John, Hampshire, England: ширборн ст джон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Brocas родилась в 1320 г. в местности ширборн ст джон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Brocas было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fettiplace, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Missenden в 1339 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1383 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Missenden en 1339, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1383, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
